steps.title: Locate Group 6 on the horizontal axis
steps.content: Identify the sixth bar from the left on the graph, which corresponds to Group 6.

steps.title: Read the height from the vertical axis
steps.content: Trace upward from Group 6 to the top of its bar. The bar aligns with the 40 mark on the vertical "Number of cans" axis. Group 6 collected 40 cans.
